news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title: Citi notes BPCL and IOCL's book values are more stable than HPCL's.
news.summary: Citi notes BPCL and IOCL's book values are more stable than HPCL's.

news.title:
Indian refiners to buy Iranian crude post-US waiver, as per refinery executives.
US grants 30-day waiver for oil loaded by March 20, says OFAC order.
news.summary:
Indian refiners to buy Iranian crude post-US waiver, as per refinery executives.
US grants 30-day waiver for oil loaded by March 20, says OFAC order.

news.title:
LNG disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz halve India's urea output, impacting plants' operations.
Petronet LNG declared force majeure as upstream suppliers failed to deliver contracted LNG volumes.
news.summary:
LNG disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz halve India's urea output, impacting plants' operations.
Petronet LNG declared force majeure as upstream suppliers failed to deliver contracted LNG volumes.

news.title:
HPCL raised Power Petrol prices by Rs 2/litre; regular petrol remains unchanged.
HPCL shares, along with IOC and BPCL, saw modest gains as investors showed confidence.
news.summary:
HPCL raised Power Petrol prices by Rs 2/litre; regular petrol remains unchanged.
HPCL shares, along with IOC and BPCL, saw modest gains as investors showed confidence.

news.title:
OMC stocks rallied as HPCL, IOC, and BPCL gained up to 5% on easing crude prices.
Brokerages like HDFC Securities maintain 'Buy' ratings on OMCs despite margin pressure concerns.
news.summary:
OMC stocks rallied as HPCL, IOC, and BPCL gained up to 5% on easing crude prices.
Brokerages like HDFC Securities maintain 'Buy' ratings on OMCs despite margin pressure concerns.

news.title:
OMCs raised industrial diesel prices by 25% and premium petrol by ₹2 amid US-Iran conflict.
This marks the first significant retail fuel price hike since March 2024, with pump prices steady for ordinary fuels.
news.summary:
OMCs raised industrial diesel prices by 25% and premium petrol by ₹2 amid US-Iran conflict.
This marks the first significant retail fuel price hike since March 2024, with pump prices steady for ordinary fuels.

news.title:
Oil firms hike premium petrol prices by up to Rs 2.35/litre amid energy disruptions.
Global tensions involving US, Israel, and Iran cited as the reason for price hike.
news.summary:
Oil firms hike premium petrol prices by up to Rs 2.35/litre amid energy disruptions.
Global tensions involving US, Israel, and Iran cited as the reason for price hike.

news.title:
PSU OMC shares fall as crude oil spikes; HPCL down 6.5%, BPCL 5.1%, IOC 3.4%.
Brent crude surged to $114 amid West Asia tensions; Nifty 50 fell 2.4% to 23,198.3.
news.summary:
PSU OMC shares fall as crude oil spikes; HPCL down 6.5%, BPCL 5.1%, IOC 3.4%.
Brent crude surged to $114 amid West Asia tensions; Nifty 50 fell 2.4% to 23,198.3.

news.title:
India's crude oil basket surged to $146/bbl, up 112% from February average of $69, pressuring OMCs like IOC, BPCL, HPCL.
OMCs face margin loss; LPG under-recovery could rise by ₹32,800 crore, necessitating price hikes or fiscal support.
news.summary:
India's crude oil basket surged to $146/bbl, up 112% from February average of $69, pressuring OMCs like IOC, BPCL, HPCL.
OMCs face margin loss; LPG under-recovery could rise by ₹32,800 crore, necessitating price hikes or fiscal support.

news.title:
West Asia tensions wiped ₹6T from PSU stocks' market cap; Nifty 50 fell 8%, crude crossed $100/barrel.
PSU bank, oil stocks led declines; BPCL fell 22%, Canara Bank down 13-15%; fundamentals remain stable.
news.summary:
West Asia tensions wiped ₹6T from PSU stocks' market cap; Nifty 50 fell 8%, crude crossed $100/barrel.
PSU bank, oil stocks led declines; BPCL fell 22%, Canara Bank down 13-15%; fundamentals remain stable.

news.title:
BPCL confirms interest and principal payment for Rs. 935.6 Cr NCDs maturing on 17 Mar 2026.
Interest of Rs. 70.9 Cr paid as scheduled; full redemption executed on due date.
news.summary:
BPCL confirms interest and principal payment for Rs. 935.6 Cr NCDs maturing on 17 Mar 2026.
Interest of Rs. 70.9 Cr paid as scheduled; full redemption executed on due date.

news.title:
Fears of $200 crude rise amid US-Iran tensions impacting Strait of Hormuz, key for global oil flow.
India's high oil import dependence risks inflation, weak rupee; HPCL, BPCL, IOC stocks fall sharply.
news.summary:
Fears of $200 crude rise amid US-Iran tensions impacting Strait of Hormuz, key for global oil flow.

news.title:
Kotak reiterates 'Sell' on HPCL, BPCL, IOC, cuts targets by ~20% amid higher oil price assumptions.
OMCs face weak earnings, pricing challenges, and elevated costs; shares fell 3-5% post HSBC downgrade.
news.summary:

news.title:
Indian fuel retailers, including IOC, HPCL, and BPCL, seek advance payments from dealers.
This move comes due to significant revenue losses from retail sales amid global price surges.

Industry aims to resolve kitchen disruptions from nationwide LPG shortage.

news.title:
OMC stocks HPCL, BPCL, IOC fell 2-3% as Brent crude hit $100/bbl due to US-Iran war.
Higher crude prices squeeze OMC margins; inflation fears could prompt RBI hawkish policy shift.
